tasks.subject: [monorepo-naming-convention] [P1] Rename apps/web to apps/site and update package config
tasks.description:
Rename the marketing/docs app directory and update its package identity.

## Steps

1. **Rename directory:**
   ```bash
   git mv apps/web apps/site
   ```

2. **Update package name** in `apps/site/package.json`:
   Change `"name": "@dorkos/web"` to `"name": "@dorkos/site"`

3. **Update script comments** in `apps/site/scripts/generate-api-docs.ts` (lines 8-9):
   - `Must be run from the apps/web/ directory` ‚Üí `Must be run from the apps/site/ directory`
   - `Run via: npm run generate:api-docs -w apps/web` ‚Üí `Run via: npm run generate:api-docs -w apps/site`

4. **Regenerate lockfile:**
   ```bash
   pnpm install
   ```
   Verify no workspace resolution errors.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `apps/site/` exists, `apps/web/` does not
- [ ] `apps/site/package.json` has `"name": "@dorkos/site"`
- [ ] `apps/site/scripts/generate-api-docs.ts` references `apps/site/` not `apps/web/`
- [ ] `pnpm install` succeeds without errors

tasks.subject: [monorepo-naming-convention] [P2] Update AGENTS.md structure section and references
tasks.description:
Update AGENTS.md with the rename and fix the stale app/package counts.

## Changes

### 1. Update count (line 17)
Change:
```
This is a Turborepo monorepo with four apps and four shared packages:
```
To:
```
This is a Turborepo monorepo with five apps and seven shared packages:
```

### 2. Update ASCII tree (lines 19-36)
Replace the current tree with:
```
dorkos/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ apps/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ client/           # @dorkos/client - React 19 SPA (Vite 6, Tailwind 4, shadcn/ui)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ server/           # @dorkos/server - Express API (tsc, NodeNext)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ site/             # @dorkos/site - Marketing site & docs (Next.js 16, Fumadocs)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ obsidian-plugin/  # @dorkos/obsidian-plugin - Obsidian plugin (Vite lib, CJS)
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ e2e/              # @dorkos/e2e - Playwright browser tests
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ packages/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ cli/              # dorkos - Publishable npm CLI (esbuild bundle)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ shared/           # @dorkos/shared - Zod schemas, types (JIT .ts exports)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ db/               # @dorkos/db - Drizzle ORM schemas (SQLite)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ relay/            # @dorkos/relay - Inter-agent message bus
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ mesh/             # @dorkos/mesh - Agent discovery & registry
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ typescript-config/ # @dorkos/typescript-config - Shared tsconfig presets
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ test-utils/       # @dorkos/test-utils - Mock factories, test helpers
```

### 3. Update documentation section reference (line 269)
Change:
```
The `apps/web` workspace (`@dorkos/web`) is a Next.js 16 marketing site
```
To:
```
The `apps/site` workspace (`@dorkos/site`) is a Next.js 16 marketing site
```

### 4. Search for any other `apps/web` or `@dorkos/web` references in AGENTS.md
Use grep to find all occurrences and update them. Known locations:
- Monorepo structure ASCII tree
- Documentation section paragraph
- Any command examples referencing `@dorkos/web`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AGENTS.md says "five apps and seven shared packages"
- [ ] ASCII tree includes `apps/e2e`, `packages/db`, `packages/relay`, `packages/mesh`
- [ ] ASCII tree shows `site/` not `web/` with `@dorkos/site`
- [ ] No remaining `apps/web` or `@dorkos/web` references in AGENTS.md
- [ ] Documentation section references `apps/site` workspace

## Important: DO NOT update historical artifacts
The following files contain `apps/web` references but are point-in-time historical documents ‚Äî leave them unchanged:

- `research/` files
- `plans/` files
- `decisions/` files

## Acceptance Criteria

tasks.subject: [monorepo-naming-convention] [P3] Verify builds, typecheck, and lint pass
tasks.description:
Run the full verification suite to confirm the rename didn't break anything.

## Verification Commands

1. **Lockfile regeneration:**
   ```bash
   pnpm install
   ```
   Should complete without workspace resolution errors.

2. **Site build:**
   ```bash
   turbo build --filter=@dorkos/site
   ```
   Next.js should build successfully with the new package name.

3. **Full typecheck:**
   ```bash
   pnpm typecheck
   ```
   All packages should pass ‚Äî no unresolved `@dorkos/web` imports.

4. **Lint:**
   ```bash
   pnpm lint
   ```
   No new lint errors.

5. **Tests:**
   ```bash
   pnpm test -- --run
   ```
   All existing tests should pass (none reference `@dorkos/web` directly).

6. **Grep verification:**
   ```bash
   grep -r '@dorkos/web' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.json' --include='*.md' --include='*.mdx' apps/ packages/ contributing/ docs/ AGENTS.md CONTRIBUTING.md .claude/
   ```
   Should return NO matches in live files (only historical specs/research/plans/decisions may still reference it).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `pnpm install` succeeds
- [ ] `turbo build --filter=@dorkos/site` succeeds
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes
- [ ] No `@dorkos/web` references in live code/config/docs
